creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #5)
The comment about the missing uuid.h does not apply to the 2020.07 version.  I have a local update (to 2022.10).  That is separate from this bug.  But the patch I attached applies to that newer version as well.  I'll submit a separate bug for an update of u-boot-tools (unless someone beats me to it).
